reasoning: Both models incorrectly classified PKGBUILD as binary and skipped all analysis. Critical build/install logic remains unaudited.
coverage_issues: PKGBUILD skipped due to false binary detection
No review of build/install hooks or network/file operations
false_negatives: All potential risks in PKGBUILD missed: build()/package() functions, dependencies, install hooks
Possible .install scripts or malicious commands undetected
re_audit_focus: Source files referenced in build/package functions
learnings: Fix binary file detection: PKGBUILDs are always text
Prioritize critical files: PKGBUILD/.install must be reviewed first
Add fallback when PKGBUILD fails initial scan
Improve error handling for invalid file classification
